files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,8 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: macos-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
       - name: Swift version
         working-directory: Commander
         run: swift --version
@@ -60,6 +62,8 @@ jobs:
     needs: macos-host
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
       - uses: SwiftyLab/setup-swift@v1
         with:
           swift-version: '6.2'
